content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Stressful Training". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1132/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers, representing the array.
content.outputFormat: The output should be a single integer, the minimum number of operations required to make all elements in the array equal.

solution.approach: Sort the array and then find the median. The minimum number of operations is the sum of the absolute differences between each element and the median.

code.Python3:
import sys
n = int(input())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
arr.sort()
median = arr[n // 2]
sum = 0
for i in range(n):
    sum += abs(arr[i] - median)
print(sum)
